title: Support for math operations on real constants

features.name: real parameter declaration
features.description: Code should include a real-valued parameter declaration using the 'real' keyword

features.name: rtoi function for real-to-integer conversion
features.description: Code should include the $rtoi function call to convert a real value to an integer

features.name: display with real format specifier
features.description: Code should include a $display system task using %f format specifier for real value output

features.name: multiplication with real parameter in constant expression
features.description: Code should include a multiplication operation between an integer parameter and a real parameter used in a constant expression
